use_codes.desc: USE OF PHOSLYRA FOR REDUCTION OF SERUM PHOSPHOROUS IN PATIENTS

indications.text:
PHOSLYRATM is a phosphate binder indicated to reduce serum phosphorus in patients with end
stage renal disease (ESRD).
Management of elevated serum phosphorus levels usually includes all of the following: reduction
in dietary intake of phosphate, removal of phosphate by dialysis, and inhibition of i...

PHOSLYRA® is indicated as an adjunct to reduction in dietary intake of phosphate and dialysis
to reduce serum phosphorus in patients with kidney failure on dialysis.
